feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Migration Cockpit
entry.content:
We want to move the G/ L Account data from Parallel Customizing to Parallel Test with the Migration Cockpit App, can you please give us a step by step guidance how that works

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: New depreciation key customizing option not available
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are trying to create new depreciation key in SAP system . However, we could not find any customizing options.

Please review SAP system and provide us option to customized new depreciation key in SAP system.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Vibhor Bansal

entry.title: Catching Bounce Mails
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

we are currently looking for a way to check for bounce mails after sending invoices to customers to ensure, that the mail addresses of the reciepients are up to date. 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Apply Customer Down Payment in Debit Memo Request
entry.content:
We have the requirement to manually created debit memo requests / debit memos and clear these against previously created down payments. 

During the process of creating the debit memo request, the existing down payments are not automatically proposed. We can manage this manually. But never the less we have the need to show on the output for the debit memo, that the existing down payment will be applied and therefore no further payment is needed. 

Is there an option to achieve this. On the DMR I did not find any options to:

  • refer to the existing down payment
  • use a condition type to enter the applied down payment amount
  • anything else. 

Please propose how to handle this requirement. 

Thanks in Advance

Johannes

entry.title: Chart of Accounts in Parallel Line - Test environement (SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud 2602)
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I hope you are doing well.

We are currently working on a SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition greenfield implementation and we are facing an unexpected behavior related to the Chart of Accounts.

In the main line, we modified the Chart of Accounts in the Customizing tenant (creation of new G/L accounts using the copy functionality and updates of descriptions). All these changes correctly generated transport requests.

We then created a branch to copy these changes to the Customizing tenant of the parallel line. After the branch, we noticed that:

- All Chart of Accounts changes are visible in the parallel line Customizing tenant
- However, no transport requests exist in that tenant

We are now facing an issue because we want to perform SIT in the parallel line test tenant, but the Chart of Accounts (and some related configurations) are not available in that system.

Has anyone faced a similar issue, or are there any guidelines on how this situation should be handled in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

Any help would be highly appreciated.

Kind regards,
Alexandre B
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: External Billing API – credit memo equivalent of EOX1/EDX1/CIX1?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We use BillingDocumentRequest_In (SAP_COM_0120, scope 1Z6) in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to create billing documents from an external source system, without any preceding sales order in S/4HANA.

The invoice case works with EOX1 / EDX1 / CIX1.

For credit memos we need the equivalent combination but BillingDocumentType G2 with EOX1 / EDX1 fails with VF 002 (“Cannot bill SD documents of type EOX1 using billing type G2”), and we cannot find a delivered EOXC / EDXC or any other external credit-memo document type in customizing.

Please let us know:
  • Which SalesDocumentType, SalesDocumentItemCategory and BillingDocumentType should be sent in BillingDocumentRequest_In to create a credit memo without a preceding sales order (i.e. the counterpart of EOX1 / EDX1 / CIX1)?
  • If no such combination is delivered, what is the supported alternative for posting external credit memos in Public Cloud?

entry.title: G/L Bank Accounts - posting without entering house bank and Account ID?
entry.content:
Hi SAP experts!

Whenever I want to enter a posting to a bank account, I have to enter the house bank and account ID in the G/L account item every time. As my customer only has one bank account and makes manual postings to it quite frequently, I was wondering if it’s possible to automate this entry or omit it altogether. To this end, I’ve tried and found out the following:

1. Substitution: substitution only works for account types D or K. It is presumably intended for invoices, so that the system knows which house bank to use to pay an invoice.

2. Field status: I had hoped that the two fields ‘House Bank’ and ‘Account ID’ would be declared as mandatory fields in the field status group of the bank account’s G/L account, and that I could simply change them to optional fields. However, the fields do not appear at all in the field status settings.

Is there an alternative that would save my client from having to enter these fields manually?

Thank you in advance for any hint.

Best regards,
Rado

entry.title: Budget Availability Control for WBS Element in PR/PO – How to Enforce Hard Stop in SAP GROW
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am currently working on a procurement scenario integrated with Project System in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Scenario:

We are using WBS Element (Project System) as account assignment in Purchase Requisition (PR) and Purchase Order (PO).
Budget has been maintained at WBS level.
PR and PO are created with account assignment category "P" (Project).
Issue:
When creating PR or PO, the system does NOT trigger any budget-related validation.

Expected Behavior:
We expect the system to:

At least trigger a warning message when the budget is exceeded, OR
Ideally trigger a hard error (blocking) when PR/PO value exceeds the available WBS budget
Current Behavior:

PR and PO can be created successfully even when exceeding WBS budget
No warning message is triggered
No error or blocking occurs at all
System does not seem to perform any budget availability check
Questions:

Is budget availability control (warning or error) supported for WBS elements in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
Are there any required configurations to activate budget checks for WBS during PR/PO creation?
Is this limitation by design in Public Cloud?
What is the recommended best practice to enforce budget control in this scenario?
Custom Logic (BAdI)?
Workflow-based validation?
Alternative object like Internal Order?
Additional Info:

Scope Item: 4RF – Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management
Procurement integrated with Project (PR/PO → WBS)
Budget is already maintained in WBS and visible in reporting
Any guidance or best practice would be highly appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: No capacity availability option in configuration of define checking control
entry.content:
Dear sap,

In public cloud, when i make the configuration of define checking control,  i could not find the  capacity availability option.

But in the GUI, I could find the option in OPJK. 

And now in public, when i release the production order, i get the message 'Availability check cannot be executed for capacities' . So how could i solve the problem ?

Thanks.

Ying

entry.title: No capacity availability option in configuration of define checking control
entry.content:
Dear sap,

In public cloud, when i make the configuration of define checking control,  i could not find the  capacity availability option.

But in the GUI, I could find the option in OPJK. 

And now in public, when i release the production order, i get the message 'Availability check cannot be executed for capacities' . So how could i solve the problem ?

Thanks.

Ying

entry.title: Issue with the upload of Journal entries through the template.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have created a template to upload the journal entries and we are using both the Project(WBS element) and Cost center as account assignments in the Upload file.
when we upload the file we are facing the issues that the cost center is not recognized for some line items and the cost center value is showing as 0 .
The issue is in some line items the same cost center is considering and in some line items it showing as 0 and we are getting the error.
Please see the attachment for the details error details.

Regards

SUBHASH

entry.title: Depreciation Start Date Requirement – Beginning of Fiscal Year (Irrespective of Capitalization Date)
entry.content:
We have a business requirement where the depreciation start date of an asset should always be set to the beginning of the fiscal year, irrespective of the capitalization month.

For example:

  • Capitalization Date: 15-Nov-2026
  • Expected Depreciation Start Date: 01-JAN-2026 (Start of Fiscal Year)

    We would like to confirm:

    1. Whether it is possible in SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public Edition) to automatically set depreciation start date as start of fiscal year for all assets.
    2. If yes, please confirm the standard configuration steps.
    3. If

entry.title: There's a tutorial where I don't know how to proceed.
entry.content:
Is the following tutorial possible in a TDD S/4HANA Cloud environment?

[Tutorial] Integrate SAP BTP, ABAP environment and SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition using Basic Authentication

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-business-partner-basic-auth.html

The Customizing tenant allows the selection of the communication contract "SAP_COM_0008," but cannot be connected from Eclipse because "BR_DEVELOPER" cannot be assigned.

The Development tenant can be connected from Eclipse because "BR_DEVELOPER" can be assigned, but the communication contract "SAP_COM_0008" cannot be selected.

entry.title: For the PR Header text Mandatory when PR select priority high
entry.content:
We need to implement a validation for the Purchase Requisition (PR) header text based on priority selection.

A custom field has been created to capture PR priority. The requirement is that when the user selects Priority = High, the PR header text should become mandatory before saving the document.

Currently, this validation is not available in the standard configuration. We would like to know if there is any BAdI, enhancement spot, or other standard approach to implement this requirement.

Could you please advise the suitable technical solution or available enhancement options to achieve this functionality?

entry.title: Zero Amount Invoice in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Professional Services
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are working in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition – Professional Services, using Manage Project Billing.

We have a requirement to issue a customer invoice with zero amount, linked to a professional services project/WBS element.

Business case

We need to document a donation of 15 IT devices:

  • Tax base: 0.00 EUR
  • VAT: 0.00 EUR
  • Total invoice amount: 0.00 EUR
  • The customer tax classification is maintained as Exempt Spain 0%

Current behavior

When trying to create the billing item through Manage Project Billing, the system raises this error:

Billing plan item with zero amount not allowed

Because of this, we cannot continue with the project billing process or create the invoice.

Questions

  1. Is this standard behavior in Professional Services / Manage Project Billing?
  2. Is there any standard configuration or extensibility option to allow zero-amount project billing?
  3. Has anyone used a workaround while keeping the transaction linked to the project/WBS element?

Any guidance would be appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: Manage Billing Documents:FAZ prepayment invoice voucher tax account missing information
entry.content:
HI,SAP

 

Manage Billing Documents:Billing TypeDown Payment Request (FAZ) 

 

How to include the output tax account in the financial voucher for advance payment invoicing? The attachment is the voucher generated now

entry.title: REVERSING GOOD RECEIPT AND OPEN PURCHASE ORDERS FOR PRODUCTS TO ENABLE VALUATION CLASS CHANGE
entry.content:
Greetings,

Please we want to change valuations classes for product as they were wrongly mapped initially. but a good number of the products have open purchase orders, goods receipts and goods issues already done on them.

please is there way to reverse the transactions in bulk so as to be able to change the valuation class for these products.

 

Best regards

entry.title: Using BAS to create an ALP chart does not generate dimensions.
entry.content:
Using the code shown in the image to create the chart, the dimension section is not being generated.

Does anyone know what might be wrong with the code?

entry.title: Lease-in Contract Purchase Option at the end of the lease contract
entry.content:
SAP,

We have a lease scenario wherein the contract agreement with the supplier has a purchase option at the end of the lease contract. We can't find any SAP documentation on within the SAP KBA datamine, SAP community, or anywhere else that gives us the instructions on how to add this condition type to the lease contract.

Example: The contract starts on 5/22/2025 and ends on 4/30/2026 with a monthly lease payment of $1000. We have all the contract details added, including the rhythm rule and condition rule for the monthly lease amount; however, the contract with the supplier has a purchase option of $5,000 at the end of the contract. We don't see a condition type for this option, nor do we fully understand the logic behind the lease condition types.

We need to know how to add the purchase option to the contract and understand what each condition type means. Again, we can't find any details for this scenario.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to read long text in the billing item?
entry.content:
I want to add a field in billing template to get the information to billing item text, the text type is material sales text, how can I get it in custom logic?
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
